report.summary: UX audit and polish of 3 today's-build pages (GPU Compute, DeFi Insurance, Yield-Bearing Stablecoins) — replaced broken static OG images with dynamic /api/og, added BackToTop navigation, made all grids responsive for mobile, improved tab accessibility with ARIA roles, and standardized CSS variable usage.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: GPU Compute Guide: Added BackToTop component for long-scroll navigation
GPU Compute Guide: Made 3-col stats grid responsive (auto-fit minmax(160px, 1fr))
GPU Compute Guide: Made Use Cases and Risks 2-col grids responsive (auto-fit minmax(260px, 1fr))
GPU Compute Guide: Added role=region and aria-label on article element
DeFi Insurance Guide: Changed root <div> to semantic <main> element
DeFi Insurance Guide: Added BackToTop component for long-scroll navigation
DeFi Insurance Guide: Made Pros/Cons and Related Resources grids responsive (auto-fit minmax(280px, 1fr))
DeFi Insurance Guide: Migrated 5 hardcoded hex colors to CSS variables (bg, surface, border, text, text2)
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Added BackToTop component for long-scroll navigation
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Made Quick Stats 3-col grid responsive (auto-fit minmax(140px, 1fr))
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Made all 7 instances of 2-col grids responsive (auto-fit minmax(260px, 1fr))
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Added role=tablist on tab container, role=tab + aria-selected on tab buttons
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Added role=tabpanel on all 3 tab content panels

sections.title: OG Metadata Fixed
items: GPU Compute Guide: Replaced broken static /og-gpu-compute-guide.png with dynamic /api/og?title=Decentralized+GPU+Compute+Networks+2026&category=Learn&type=learn (1200x630)
DeFi Insurance Guide: Replaced broken static /og-defi-insurance-guide.png with dynamic /api/og?title=DeFi+Insurance+Guide+2026&category=Learn&type=learn (1200x630)
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Added missing OG image to layout.tsx using dynamic /api/og?title=Yield-Bearing+Stablecoins:+Earn+3-13%25+APY&category=Learn&type=learn (1200x630)
Yield-Bearing Stablecoins: Added Twitter card image matching OG image
All 3 pages now match the dynamic OG generation pattern used across the site

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/decentralized-gpu-compute-networks-guide (refined — OG, BackToTop, responsive grids, a11y)
/learn/defi-insurance-guide-2026 (refined — OG, BackToTop, semantic HTML, responsive grids, CSS vars)
/learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins (refined — OG image added, BackToTop, responsive grids, tab a11y)

sections.title: Remaining Backlog (Not Addressed This Cycle)
items: 228 pages still missing openGraph metadata entirely across learn/, tools/, ecosystem/
46 pages still using static PNG OG images instead of dynamic /api/og
Pre-existing TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts (40 errors) — unrelated to this cycle
